provenance.notes: Migrated for 0.20.0 schema: advisor pass produced via the mandatory advisor agent path before provenance was a required field.

diffCoverage.notes: Reviewed the send path: command/send_message reuses the stored session and delegates to zalo/send_text. Live send delivered one real message.

findings.evidence: send_message takes account_id + thread_id + text and looks up an already-authenticated session from managed state; the UI never re-sends credentials, and only a message id string is returned.
findings.fix: When session-manager lands, key sends by the active account and add rate-limit guards to avoid spam-like behavior (project risk r1).

summary: send-text is proven live: one real text message was delivered to the authorized recipient and Zalo returned a message id. The command validates input at the boundary and reuses the stored session rather than re-accepting credentials; send is delegated to the zalo layer. No secrets cross IPC. Build, clippy -D warnings, 7 offline tests, and the live send all pass. Safe to mark done.
